mapper.select:
SELECT Q.PERSON_ID, Q.EMPID, Q.LOCAL_NAME, Q.DEPTNO, Q.ITEM_NO, Q.TOTAL_QUANTITY, GET_DEPT_NAME(Q.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(Q.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ITEM_NAME FROM ( SELECT HE.PERSON_ID, HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, HE.DEPTNO, D.ITEM_NO, TO_CHAR(SUM(D.QUANTITY)) AS TOTAL_QUANTITY FROM AR_DETAIL_HTSV D, HR_EMPLOYEE HE WHERE HE.PERSON_ID = D.PERSON_ID AND D.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.ITEM_NO IN ( SELECT AIP.ITEM_NO FROM AR_ITEM_PARAM AIP, AR_ITEM AI WHERE AIP.ITEM_NO = AI.ITEM_NO AND AIP.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AI.ITEM_GROUP_CODE = '1433' )
AND D.AR_DATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
AND D.AR_DATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
GROUP BY HE.PERSON_ID, HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, HE.DEPTNO, D.ITEM_NO ) Q ORDER BY Q.ITEM_NO

SELECT DISTINCT AIP.ITEM_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(AIP.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ITEM_NAME FROM AR_ITEM_PARAM AIP, AR_ITEM AI WHERE AIP.ITEM_NO = AI.ITEM_NO AND AIP.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AI.ITEM_GROUP_CODE = '1433' ORDER BY AIP.ITEM_NO

SELECT TO_CHAR(D.PK_NO) AS PK_NO, D.PERSON_ID, HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, D.SHIFT_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(D.SHIFT_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SHIFT_NAME, (SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(S.FROM_TIME), 'HH24:MI') || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(MAX(S.TO_TIME), 'HH24:MI') FROM AR_SHIFT020 S WHERE S.SHIFT_NO = D.SHIFT_NO) AS WORK_TIME, D.AR_DATE_STR, D.ITEM_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(D.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ITEM_NAME, TO_CHAR(D.FROM_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS FROM_TIME_STR, TO_CHAR(D.TO_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS TO_TIME_STR, TO_CHAR(D.QUANTITY) AS QUANTITY FROM AR_DETAIL_HTSV D, HR_EMPLOYEE HE WHERE HE.PERSON_ID = D.PERSON_ID AND D.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND D.AR_DATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
AND D.AR_DATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
ORDER BY D.AR_DATE_STR
